EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Please verify your email before logging in
INVALID_PASSWORD_RESET_TOKEN: Invalid or expired password reset token
DATABASE_NAME_TAKEN: Database name is already taken in this space.
PROPERTY_NAME_TAKEN: Property name is already taken in this database.
PASSWORD_ALREADY_SET: A password is already set. Use the change password endpoint instead.
PROPERTY_NOT_BELONG_TO_DATABASE: Property does not belong to the same database
PAGE_PAGE_SIZE_MUST_BE_POSITIVE: page and pageSize must be positive integers
NOT_RESOURCE_OWNER: You do not own this resource
USER_EMAIL_EXISTS: User with this email already exists
USER_USERNAME_EXISTS: User with this username already exists
DATABASE_STRUCTURE_LOCKED: Database structure is locked and cannot be modified
SECTION_NOT_FOUND: Section not found in this space
REGISTRATION_SUCCESS: Registration successful. Please check your email to verify your account.
PASSWORD_RESET_GENERIC: If this email is registered, you will receive a password reset link.
COOLDOWN_ACTIVE: Please wait {seconds} seconds before requesting a new email.
DEV_USER_NOT_FOUND: No user found for {email} — nothing to reset
INPUT_TOO_LONG: Input value too long for field
TEMPLATE_PROPERTY_VALUE_NOT_FOUND_ID: Template property value with id {id} not found
SECTION_NOT_IN_SPACE: Section does not belong to this space
SECTION_NAME_TAKEN: Section with this name already exists in this space
SECTION_CREATE_REQUIRES_DATA: CREATE operation requires "create" field with section data
PROPERTY_TYPE_NOT_REGISTERED: No handler registered for property type: {type}
PROPERTY_VALUE_REQUIRED: Property "{name}" is required and cannot be empty
VIEW_LIMIT_REACHED: Maximum number of views (5) reached for this database
VIEW_LOCKED: This view is locked and cannot be modified
CANNOT_DELETE_LAST_VIEW: Cannot delete the last view of a database
CANNOT_CHANGE_POSITION_NAME_PROPERTY: Cannot change the position of the Name property
CANNOT_CHANGE_GROUP_NAME_PROPERTY: The Name property must always stay in the General group
CANNOT_CHANGE_TYPE_NAME_PROPERTY: Cannot change the type of the Name property
PROPERTY_GROUP_NOT_BELONG_TO_DATABASE: Property group does not belong to this database
DATABASE_NOT_IN_SPACE: Database does not belong to this space
CSV_INVALID_FORMAT: Invalid file format. Only CSV files are supported
CSV_EMPTY_FILE: CSV file is empty or has no data rows
CSV_MISSING_COLUMNS: CSV file has no column headers
AUTOMATION_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Maximum number of automations (10) reached for this database
AUTOMATION_TRIGGER_ACTION_INCOMPATIBLE: This action type is not compatible with the selected trigger
INTEGRATION_KEY_NOT_READ_ONLY: API key must be read-only (enableTrading and enableWithdrawals must be disabled)
INTEGRATION_NOT_LINKED_TO_SPACE: Integration connection is not linked to any space.
CSV_VALUE_HEADER_ROW: "{value}" looks like a header row — skipping
CSV_VALUE_NOT_A_CHECKBOX: "{value}" is not a valid value. Use: true/false, 1/0, yes/no
CSV_VALUE_NOT_A_DURATION: "{value}" is not a valid duration (must be a number ≥ 0)
CSV_VALUE_RATING_RANGE: "{value}" is out of range — rating must be 0–5
CSV_VALUE_PROGRESS_RANGE: "{value}" is out of range — progress must be 0–100
CSV_TYPE_NOT_SUPPORTED: Property type {type} is not supported for CSV import
SELECT_INVALID_OPTION: "{value}" is not a valid option. Available: {options}
STATUS_INVALID_OPTION: "{value}" is not a valid status. Available: {options}
INVALID_MAPPING_JSON: mapping must be a valid JSON object
